note: Vditor bundles Mermaid 11.6.0; we vendor a newer 11.15.0 (same major, API-compatible: globalThis.mermaid + initialize/render). Re-pin with: node media-src/scripts/fetch-mermaid.mjs <version>. build.mjs (syncMermaid) verifies sha256 and copies over Vditor's bundled copy; esbuild-shared.mjs bumps the ?v= cache-buster to this version.
